title: Run lifecycle ledger transitions in shadow mode
goal: Record evidence-bound lifecycle transition proposals and compare them with canonical Git outcomes before reducing Registry PRs.

acceptance.assertion: Ledger transitions are proposal-only and cannot change canonical task state.
Each proposal binds task revision, evidence authority, source reference and observed time.
Parity, false-positive, false-negative and stale-evidence rates are measured over a reproducible sample.
Git lifecycle reduction requires an explicit later review and cannot happen in this task.

metadata.source: Bureau total audit and Truth Model v2 design
